title: Blepharoglossum riparium
taxonomy: Blepharoglossum riparium is classified within the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody or spleenwort family. This family is a part of the larger group known as Polypodiales, an order of ferns. The Polypodiaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Blepharoglossum riparium belonging to the subfamily Pleurodiioideae. The classification of Blepharoglossum riparium is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Polypodiaceae, subfamily Pleurodiioideae, and genus Blepharoglossum. The species name riparium is likely derived from the Latin word 'ripa,' meaning riverbank, indicating the plant's habitat.
